creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update the VIGRA port to version 1.8.0 (September 20, 2011).

It seems to be necessary to use GCC 4.6 to avoid some problem with include/vigra/mathutil.hxx.

Please have a look, if the added license info is correct so far, see http://hci.iwr.uni-heidelberg.de/vigra/LICENSE.txt


P.S.: With this update PR ports/158616 and PR ports/161666 should be expendable. graphics/vigra is also used by math/saga for example and in there hdf5 support is a nice feature.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
